debug_info.goal:
U : Type
⊢ ctble U ↔ ∃ f, one_to_one f

proof:
by
  rw [ctble_iff_set_nat_equinum]
  constructor
  · intro ⟨A, g, hg_oto, hg_onto⟩
    use fun u => (Classical.choose (hg_onto u)).val
    intro u1 u2 heq
    have h1 := Classical.choose_spec (hg_onto u1)
    have h2 := Classical.choose_spec (hg_onto u2)
    have heq' : Classical.choose (hg_onto u1) = Classical.choose (hg_onto u2) := 
      Subtype.val_injective heq
    rw [← h1, ← h2, heq']
  · intro ⟨f, hf⟩
    use range f
    use fun ⟨n, hn⟩ => Classical.choose hn
    constructor
    · intro ⟨n1, hn1⟩ ⟨n2, hn2⟩ heq
      have h1 := Classical.choose_spec hn1
      have h2 := Classical.choose_spec hn2
      apply Subtype.ext
      calc n1 = f (Classical.choose hn1) := h1.symm
           _ = f (Classical.choose hn2) := congrArg f heq
           _ = n2 := h2
    · intro u
      have hu : f u ∈ range f := ⟨u, rfl⟩
      use ⟨f u, hu⟩
      exact hf (Classical.choose hu) u (Classical.choose_spec hu)
